privileged_info_summary: The task validates DOT hazard class compliance for 5 real chemicals obtained from CAMEO Chemicals database (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). All verified ground truth values are correct: UN 1203 (Gasoline) official class 3; UN 1824 (Sodium hydroxide solution) official class 8; UN 1050 (Hydrogen chloride, anhydrous) official class 2.3; UN 2014 (Hydrogen peroxide, aqueous) official class 5.1; UN 1090 (Acetone) official class 3. The input CSV data is synthetically created but uses real chemical identifiers and intentionally includes compliance failures (3 FAIL, 2 PASS) for audit verification. The task requires agents to look up official classifications from CAMEO Chemicals and perform strict matching against listed values.
